name: Douyin-to-Photos
author: local-workspace
description: Resolve authorized Douyin share links into playable MP4 URLs via configurable API providers, then save to Photos and clean temp files.

api_fallback.description: Fallback parser endpoint returning normalized JSON

error_handling.invalid_url: 未识别到有效抖音链接，请重新复制分享链接后重试。
error_handling.timeout: 网络超时，请检查网络或稍后重试。
error_handling.api_limit: 解析服务繁忙或已达上限，请稍后重试或切换备用接口。
error_handling.empty_video_url: 解析成功但未返回可下载地址，请更换视频或备用接口。

privacy.statement: Skill does not store user links, media, or personal identifiers outside local runtime.

compliance.note: Publish with clear lawful-use disclaimer in listing README.
